auth.mechanism: JWT Bearer dual-token mode (accessToken + refreshToken) with rotation. Patient identity additionally verified via POST /patients/verify to establish which patient record the authenticated user is acting on. The admin panel uses a separate JWT token system under the /admin prefix, independent from the patient token system.
tokenTypes: accessToken (JWT, HS256/RS256, 15-minute expiry, payload: sub=userId, patientId, phone, iat, exp)
refreshToken (opaque >=32 bytes Base64 URL-safe, 7-day validity, single-use rotation)

code.description: Error code string, see error code list

message.description: Developer-readable error description (not shown to patients)

details.description: Additional details; Zod validation failure issues when applicable

retriable.description: Whether the operation is worth retrying; UI fallback rules apply when absent

errorCodes.meaning: Response data does not match frontend contract; details contains Zod issues
Non-2xx HTTP response parsed from status code
Flow card has been updated or invalidated; prompt refresh
Refresh token is invalid or has been rotated
Rate limit exceeded; retry after backoff
Session already has a title (idempotency guard)
Delivery address ID required when mode=delivery
Session is not in the required state for this operation

httpStatusUiMapping.meaning: Cannot access this record, not retriable

enums.name: FulfillmentStatus
enums.description: Medication fulfillment status (v8, same values as MedicationFulfillmentStatus)

endpoints.summary: Identity verification, returns patient summary and readable scopes
Read patient context (medical history, allergies, prior diagnosis)

Update patient profile — add/edit allergies, chronicDiseases, longTermMedications, and medicalHistory. Optional fields are omitted entirely from the request body to leave the existing value unchanged.

allergies.description: Allergies (full replacement). Each element trimmed, min 1 char. Omit to leave unchanged, pass [] to clear.

chronicDiseases.description: Chronic diseases (full replacement). Each element trimmed, min 1 char. Omit to leave unchanged, pass [] to clear.

longTermMedications.description: Long-term medications (full replacement). Each element trimmed, min 1 char. Omit to leave unchanged, pass [] to clear.

medicalHistory.description: NEW in v2. Medical history (full replacement). Each element trimmed, min 1 char. Omit to leave unchanged, pass [] to clear. Stored at PatientContext level, not PatientProfile.

responseBody.description: Updated patient profile (does NOT include medicalHistory; medicalHistory is accessible via GET /patients/:patientId/context)

Create follow-up visit session from parent session
List historical visit sessions with cursor pagination

Read-only complete session snapshot with full timeline

responseBody.description: Server-Sent Events. Each event validated against assistantStreamEventSchema. Supports AbortSignal for interruption.

Acknowledge advice-only disposition and close visit

SSE: Completed-state consultation Q&A (does not create follow-up session)

endpoints.summary: Report vitals triggering emergency recheck
Active exit with settlement result
Pause or resume the overall visit timer

responseBody.description: Updated session with timerPaused, pausedAt, timeoutAt reflecting timer state

endpoints.summary: Dismiss emergency (false alarm appeal), restore from emergency state
Register a new user. On success, directly issues a token pair (no second login required).

realName.description: Optional; stored as empty if omitted; can be filled later
null if not provided during registration

endpoints.summary: Login with phone + password, issue a new token pair.
Exchange a refreshToken for a new token pair. The old refreshToken is immediately invalidated (rotation).

refreshToken.description: New refresh token (old one is invalidated)

endpoints.summary: Logout current session, invalidate the server-held refreshToken. Idempotent — returns 200 even if token is already invalid.

Call backend LLM to generate a short consultation title (1-50 Chinese characters) based on conversation context. Idempotent: if session already has a title, backend may return existing title or regenerate.

title.description: Generated title, trimmed, short Chinese phrase without punctuation

endpoints.summary: Query patient delivery address list

tag.description: Address label. Enum: 家, 公司, 医院, 其他. Min 1, max 20 chars, cannot be cleared once set (v9).

endpoints.summary: Create a new delivery address. Auto-sets as default if it is the first address. If isDefault=true, cancels other default addresses.

patientId.description: Patient ID, must match path param

isDefault.description: Whether to set as default address

tag.description: Address label. Enum: 家, 公司, 医院, 其他

responseBody.description: The created Address object with all address fields

endpoints.summary: Update a delivery address. All fields optional. Submitting isDefault=true cancels other defaults.

isDefault.description: Whether to set as default address

tag.description: Address label. Enum: 家, 公司, 医院, 其他

endpoints.summary: Delete a delivery address. If deleting the default address and addresses remain, auto-sets the first remaining as default.
Set a delivery address as the default. Cancels other default addresses.

responseBody.description: The updated Address object with isDefault=true

endpoints.summary: Aggregate all historical payment card records for the current patient, sorted by createdAt descending

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token identifying the current patient

endpoints.summary: Aggregate all completed/confirmed medical orders and medication records from historical consultations for the authenticated patient, sorted by handledAt descending.

items.description: List of medical order records sorted by handledAt descending

endpoints.summary: Suspend a visit session when idle timeout triggers (lastActivityAt exceeds idle threshold). Non-terminal state — does not write endedAt or terminalReason, only sets status to 'suspended' and clears activeCardId.

pathParams.name: sessionId
pathParams.description: Session ID of the visit to suspend

endpoints.summary: Admin login, returns access tokens and user info. Uses independent JWT token system from patient API.
Admin logout, invalidates current refreshToken. Returns success even if token is already invalid.
Refresh admin access token (rotation mechanism, old refreshToken is immediately invalidated).
Get dashboard statistics
Paginated patient list with fuzzy search by realName or phone

queryParams.name: search
queryParams.description: Fuzzy search by realName or phone

endpoints.summary: Get single patient's full profile. Reuses patient-side PatientProfile response structure.

responseBody.description: Full PatientProfile object (same structure as patient-side GET /patients/:patientId/context patient field)

endpoints.summary: Paginated session list with status and patient filtering

endpoints.summary: Get system settings
Update system settings (partial update supported)

responseBody.description: The complete, updated SystemSettings object (same structure as GET /admin/settings response)

mergeNotes: Merge of 1 base spec + 8 incremental patches. PATCH /patients/:patientId/profile from base and v2 were merged (v2 adds medicalHistory field). POST /visits/:sessionId/fulfillment from base and v5 were merged (v5 adds conditionally-required addressId for delivery mode). Enums: VisitStatus and VisitMachineState gained 'suspended' (v9); SystemEventType gained 'session_suspended' (v9); InterruptedBy gained 'idle' (v9). VisitSession gained 'lastActivityAt' (v9) and VisitSummary gained 'title' (v4). The auth evolved from a token-carrier-agnostic model (base) to JWT Bearer dual-token (v2-v4). Admin API (v7) uses a separate base path /admin with independent auth. Admin endpoints are listed with full /admin prefix in their paths (they are not under the /api base URL). The admin API's error format is not standardized; each admin endpoint documents its own status codes paired with string error codes (INVALID_CREDENTIALS, UNAUTHORIZED, INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN, INVALID_SETTINGS). Admin gender enum (male, female, unknown) is a subset of the patient Gender enum; the full patient Gender (male, female, other, unknown) is authoritative. FulfillmentStatus (v8) shares values with MedicationFulfillmentStatus but is used in the medical-orders context.
